title: "agenticMemoryMaterializedFactLogBootstrapBundle()"

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create a graph-visible D593 bundle over already-materialized D591 DATA.

The bundle only projects ordinary DATA nodes for explicit caller wiring. It
never reads storage, owns restore/bootstrap lifecycle, mutates live records,
refreshes subscribers, or creates a graph commit barrier.

## Import

```ts
import { agenticMemoryMaterializedFactLogBootstrapBundle } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function agenticMemoryMaterializedFactLogBootstrapBundle(
	graph: Graph,
	opts: AgenticMemoryMaterializedFactLogBootstrapBundleOptions<TJson>,
): AgenticMemoryMaterializedFactLogBootstrapBundle<TJson>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes. |
| `opts` | `AgenticMemoryMaterializedFactLogBootstrapBundleOptions<TJson>` | Materialization input node and optional bundle name. |

## Returns

Projection and read-model nodes for D593 caller-wirable DATA.
